executeSwap(address,address,uint24,uint2.details: The vault approves the router, the router checks the policy,      and the swap output returns to the vault (not the agent).

migrateTo(address,address[]).details: Used when vault contract is upgraded. Moves all token balances.

stakeETH(uint256).details: Principal is tracked so agent can only access yield, never principal

tradeYield(address,uint24,uint256,uint25.details: Only yield above principal can be traded — principal is locked

availableYield().notice: Get available yield (wstETH value above principal)

balance(address).notice: Get vault balance for a token

depositETH().notice: Deposit ETH — automatically wraps to WETH

migrateTo(address,address[]).notice: Migrate all funds to a new vault — owner only

setAgent(address).notice: Change the agent address — only owner

setLidoAddresses(address,address).notice: Set Lido contract addresses (owner only, one-time setup per chain)

stakeETH(uint256).notice: Stake ETH via Lido → get stETH → wrap to wstETH (owner only)

tradeYield(address,uint24,uint256,uint25.notice: Agent can trade available yield via the router (policy-checked)

withdrawETH(uint256).notice: Withdraw ETH — unwraps WETH first, only owner
